pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property and Maven enforcer rules to require Java 21.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency from version 2.5.6 to 3.2.0-RC2.
Add the Spring Milestones repository to resolve dependencies for the Spring Boot 3.2.0-RC2 release candidate.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI starter dependencies compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data MongoDB dependency to support MongoDB integration.
Add Mongock dependencies for schema migration management in MongoDB.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation support.
Add Spring Boot Starter Actuator dependency for production-ready features.
Add Apache Maven Model dependency for programmatic POM manipulation.
Add Joox dependency for jQuery-like DOM manipulation in Java.
Add Dom4j dependency for XML processing.
Add Night-Config Toml dependency for configuration file parsing.
Add SnakeYAML dependency for YAML parsing.
Add Byte Buddy dependency for runtime code generation and manipulation.
Add Cucumber dependencies for BDD testing integration with JUnit Platform and Spring.
Add Testcontainers MongoDB dependency for integration testing with real database instances.
Add Frontend Maven Plugin to manage Node.js and npm installation and build steps within the Maven lifecycle.
Add Maven Checkstyle Plugin to enforce code style rules during the build.
Add Git Commit ID Plugin to generate git properties for the application.
Add Sonar Maven Plugin for static code analysis integration.
Add Maven Javadoc Plugin to generate and attach Javadoc JARs.
Add Maven Source Plugin to generate and attach Source JARs.
Add Maven GPG Plugin for signing artifacts during release.
Add Nexus Staging Maven Plugin for deploying releases to OSSRH.
Add GraalVM Native Maven Plugin for building native images.
Add -parameters compiler argument to preserve parameter names in bytecode for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Update Surefire and Failsafe plugin configurations to exclude/include Cucumber tests instead of IntTest.
Configure resource filtering for application properties to allow property substitution during build.
Add Checksum Maven Plugin to track frontend asset changes and skip builds if unchanged.
Add Maven Antrun Plugin to evaluate frontend checksums and set skip properties.
Add Properties Maven Plugin to read Sonar properties from a file.
Update JaCoCo plugin configuration to exclude new frontend and wrapper paths.
Add a deployment profile for releasing artifacts to Maven Central (OSSRH).
Add a build profile for Spring Boot packaging and native image configuration.
Update project groupId, artifactId, name, description, and SCM information to reflect the new JHipster Lite identity.
Remove Guava dependency as it is no longer required or replaced by other libraries.
Remove Mustache compiler dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove Mockito Inline dependency as it is deprecated/merged in newer Mockito versions.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Remove explicit indent size configuration for Java files, likely relying on default or IDE settings.
Enforce CRLF line endings for Windows batch and PowerShell scripts to ensure compatibility.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Ensure TOML files are treated as text with LF line endings in the repository.
Ensure patch files are treated as text with LF line endings to support git patch operations.

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Refine GitHub Actions triggers to include workflow_dispatch and restrict push/PR events to the main branch.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add concurrency group configuration to cancel in-progress workflows for the same branch.
Decompose the single pipeline job into distinct jobs for Windows tests, Linux tests, Cypress, and generation.
Upgrade GitHub Actions dependencies (checkout, cache, upload-artifact, etc.) to newer major versions.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
uses: actions/checkout@v4
uses: actions/cache@v3
uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Replace manual Node.js and npm installation steps with a custom reusable setup action.
Update Maven repository cache key to include hash of pom.xml for better cache invalidation.
Integrate local SonarQube analysis and SonarCloud reporting into the Linux test job.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
- name: 'Start local Sonar'
  run: docker-compose -f src/main/docker/sonar.yml up -d
...
- name: 'Analysis: SonarCloud'
  run: ./mvnw initialize sonar:sonar ...

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Upload JaCoCo, LCOV, and JAR artifacts from the Linux test job for use in subsequent jobs.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
- name: 'Artifact: upload JaCoCo report'
  uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
  with:
    name: jacoco
    path: '${{ github.workspace }}/target/jacoco/jacoco.xml'

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add a dedicated job to run Cypress end-to-end tests using the generated JAR artifact.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
cypress:
  needs: [tests-linux]
  ...
  - name: 'Test: launch Cypress'
    run: npm run e2e:headless

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add a matrix job to test the generation of various application types (Angular, React, etc.) with different configurations.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
generation:
  strategy:
    matrix:
      app:
        - fullapp
        - angularapp
        ...
      include:
        - java-version: 17
        - java-version: 21

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add a dedicated job to upload coverage reports to Codecov after tests and Cypress jobs complete.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
codecov:
  needs: cypress
  ...
  - name: 'Codecov: sending JaCoCo analysis...'
    uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add a status-checks job to enforce that all required CI jobs pass before merging.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
status-checks:
  needs: [tests-linux, codecov, generation]
  ...
  - name: Validation Status checks
    run: | ...

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add a job to automatically merge Dependabot pull requests for non-major version updates.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
dependabot-auto-merge:
  ...
  - name: Enable auto-merge for Dependabot PRs
    run: gh pr merge --auto --merge "$PR_URL"

.gitignore.general_idea: Remove a specific integration test file from gitignore to allow it to be tracked or removed from the ignore list.
Ensure the Gradle wrapper JAR is not ignored in the generator resources directory.
Ensure the Maven wrapper JAR is not ignored in the generator resources directory.
Ignore CI-specific process ID files generated during testing.
Ignore roadmap PNG files except for a specific Spring Boot project image.
Ignore the Tikui UI library cache directory.
Ignore the Fontello icon font session file.
Refine VS Code ignore rules to explicitly allow settings, tasks, and launch configurations while ignoring other VS Code files.
Ignore files with .history extension often created by IDEs or editors.
Ignore Angular CLI cache and distribution directories.
Ignore SvelteKit generated files and cache.
Ignore personal Spring Boot application configuration profiles.

.lintstagedrc.js.general_idea: Add ESLint auto-fix to the lint-staged configuration for JavaScript, TypeScript, and Vue files.
Add Stylelint auto-fix to the lint-staged configuration for CSS and SCSS files.
Add Pug linting to the lint-staged configuration for Pug template files.
Refactor the Prettier glob pattern in lint-staged to exclude files handled by other linters and include new file types like XML.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper to version 3.2.0 to align with modern build tooling standards.
Upgrade the bundled Maven distribution to version 3.9.5 to ensure compatibility with newer plugin features and Java versions.

.prettierignore.general_idea: Explicitly include Gradle generator Java source and test directories in Prettier formatting by negating the ignore pattern.

.prettierrc.general_idea: Add Prettier plugins for XML and Java formatting support.
Replace deprecated jsxBracketSameLine option with the new bracketSameLine option.
Remove the specific Java file override block as formatting is now handled by the plugin.
Add XML whitespace sensitivity configuration for Prettier.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.2.0 to align with modern Maven standards.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed header comment to 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0'

mvnw.general_idea: Remove support for the deprecated M2_HOME environment variable, relying solely on JAVA_HOME and wrapper properties.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed M2_HOME resolution logic and references in Cygwin/Mingw path conversions

mvnw.general_idea: Update the default download URL for the maven-wrapper.jar to point to the new Apache Maven Wrapper artifact (3.2.0).
Improve robustness of Java command detection by unsetting shell functions that might shadow the 'command' builtin.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed JAVACMD assignment to use '\\unset -f command; \\command -v java'

mvnw.general_idea: Correct the base directory resolution to use the script's location rather than the current working directory, ensuring portability.
Add cleanup logic to remove partially downloaded wrapper jars if the download command fails.
mvnw.human_impl: Added '[ $? -eq 0 ] || rm -f "$wrapperJarPath"' after wget and curl commands

mvnw.general_idea: Update the fallback Java downloader logic to compile and run the correct source file for the new wrapper version.
mvnw.human_impl: Renamed javaClass to javaSource/javaClass and updated compilation/execution paths

mvnw.general_idea: Support the MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS environment variable for easier debugging of the wrapper itself.
mvnw.human_impl: Added '$MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS' to the exec command arguments

mvnw.general_idea: Remove the -Dmaven.home system property from the wrapper execution, as it is no longer required or recommended in newer Maven versions.
